note: FROZEN contract for the PURE resolveProject(encodedDir, {knownRoots, aliases}). The Claude `~/.claude/projects/<encoded-cwd>` dir name is Claude Code's cwd sanitizer (binary v2.1.195): every character outside [A-Za-z0-9_-] becomes `-` (so `/`, `.`, space, `@`, etc. all collapse to `-`), while underscore and hyphen are preserved. It is therefore NOT reversible (sibling repo `yard-ops-extra` and nested dir `yard-ops/extra` encode identically; `/a-b`, `/a.b` both -> `-a-b`). Resolution is a forward, segment-boundary longest-prefix match: encode each knownRoot the same way (trailing slashes stripped); a cwd matches a root if it equals it or continues it at a `-` boundary; the longest match wins; two DISTINCT roots colliding at the longest length -> __unattributed__ (refuse to guess); 0 matches -> __unattributed__ (fail closed). `aliases` map a worktree/old-name absolute path to a canonical, KNOWN, non-sentinel root; a stray alias is ignored. ACCEPTED LIMITATION: an undiscovered sibling like `yard-ops-extra` attributes to the enclosing `yard-ops` (indistinguishable from a nested cwd) — mitigated by passing the complete discovered git-root set + the report-only Unattributed share. Pins LABEL correctness (which token reconciliation cannot). Cases authored 2026-06-29 (Phase 0-B); encoding verified against the installed Claude Code sanitizer.

cases.name: nested cwd under a repo -> the enclosing repo
sibling-prefix: a run IN yard-ops resolves to yard-ops, not yard-ops-extra
sibling-prefix: a run IN yard-ops-extra resolves to yard-ops-extra (longest match wins, not yard-ops)
nested under yard-ops with a sibling yard-ops-extra present -> still the enclosing yard-ops
alias hit: a worktree cwd resolves to its canonical root's key+label
unresolvable: a cwd under no known root -> __unattributed__ (fail closed)
home-dir catch-all is NOT a root -> a bare home cwd is unattributed (the cwd-as-project unsoundness)
encoding: a space in the root path is sanitized to a dash (matches Claude's sanitizer)
encoding: an underscore in the repo name is PRESERVED (not sanitized)
lossy collision: two distinct roots encode identically and both match -> __unattributed__ (refuse to guess)
accepted ambiguity: an undiscovered sibling yard-ops-extra (only yard-ops known) attributes to the enclosing yard-ops
normalization: a root supplied with a trailing slash still matches
alias guard: an alias whose target is a reserved sentinel is ignored -> __unattributed__
